TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay_Hosing_Ku, title = Hosing_Ku, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Atayal]}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/wiki/Hosing_Ku} }

S.FORM: == Hosing Ku(復興區 qalang Pyasan) == Pyasan hiya' ga spyang ini khmay squliq nya maki sa Toweng. Pyasan hiya' ga qutux lahuy qalang rgyax. Hosing Ku (復興區, Pyasan) mki sku Toweng si. su'unun kwara glabang lingay 'kiyan ga 336.75 km² (rhyan rinpang glabang lingay 'kiyan ga 195.32 km², rr'an hyan glabang lingay 'kiyan ga 120.65 km²), 10,692 hi ku su'unun kwara alang hi kya, 3,655 buwan ku kwarakya, tiku sahuy na alang Gyencumin ga 6,817 hi, kyala kwara pinspung s'uli ga 64%. kwara sahuy na alang Gyencumin ga Taywang Gyencumin na Tayan ku smrrhu ku pyux s'uli taya kya. rhzyal kki'an Xusing ga cyux maki sa tong nan na Toweng sohih Sinciku, yatux ga sobih Cyama. rekisi Fuxing , lalu' nya 'Tayal sraral ga Pyasan, trang maki Gipun ga Sinciku syu Cyma gun, masup pciriq lga sllwan nha Pyasan. kawas 1954 te mpou byacing ru mtzyul ryax lga sllwan nha Fuxing syang la. skahul sinbung minrwan trang ryax nasa ga, "m_yan nyux sqqas ita' 'Tayal mha hintgan na soto ki nyux nha galun Taywan" lma', ru spwah nha syang kong so' miru biru teta smwan qu sexu'. kawas 2014 te mopu sazing byacing mpusal magal ryax, yugun na sexu Toyen keng sa Toyen si' lga, yasa gmlu m'iyuw sa Fuxing cyu'i la. Kawas 2014 spwah nha "Taywan gyencumin pulwo sintong lyenmong"kmal mha aki zyugun lalu na "Pyasan"squ "Pyaway"ini ga "Pyasan Pyaway", ana ga ini swali' 'Tayal qalang Pyasan. ays ptyaw sebu Hosing Ku ays psgayun 10 ru 58 alang. 58 alang hani ga, Pyasan , Rahaw(Takan) , Wsilung , Hbun , Hbun-sinqumi , Kinyawpan , Rangay , Kawbu' , Khpan , Raga' , Rahu' , Qapu' , Qus , Yubang , Triqan , Zihing , Kayu-baliq , Kzyay , Tuba , Luhung , Blhuy , Blhuy , Bilus , Qoyaw , Qoyaw , Silong , Qoyaw , Snazi , Kin'lwan , Sqiy , Cyasi , Yuwhbun raka , Kayway , Qus , Qmocyan ,Babau , Qnau , Ksunu' , Qehuy , Kuli , Sbunaw , Quri , Uruw , Tkasan , Raka , Piyaway , Tgleq , Saruc , Twan nokan , Zihing , Qrahu , Tqwiy , Ngurus , Qphay , Balung , 'Bu balung , Qara , Quzi . rhzyal​ tay 'zil na Hosing Ku hya' ga wsilung krahu'. tay 'zil na Hosing Ku hya' ga Nahuy go, Kansai go. tuqi qsya' ki rrhzyal maki na ryax khangan Gipun na' ga kya magal qu ulay nya, nanu sga "Syasan, Qrahu', Pyaway, Balung ki Rahu". misu qani ga nanak ulay Syasan ki Qrahu' nyux msthay la, kwara ulay sraral ga wal blun uraw kwara la. Kawas 1997 sllwan nha "ulay Gihing"qu "ulay Balung". tuqi 'san kya qu "Tay 7 Syan"ru "S_taw 118 haw" ssquliq pinlpgan misu qani maki te mtzyu' qalang gyencumin 'Tayal sa rgrgyax squ Taywan ga yasa son p'yang khmay na qalang gyencumin 'Tayal. gmlu sa nyux 'n_gyut khmay qu Toyen lga 'n_gyut khmay uzi ru magal kawas misu qani mga maki te spat lpgan qu kinhelaw nya tmuwang pzyux squliq nya squ kwara' ita Taywan. kisya' glgan Ungat kisya' glgan hiya kintzyux na Squliq kayal ppqbaqan pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy 介壽國民小學 Pyasan pqwasan laqi cikuy 三光國民小學 Gogan pqwasan laqi cikuy 光華國民小學Ngurus pqwasan laqi cikuy 羅浮國民小學Kinyawpan pqwasan laqi cikuy 奎輝國民小學Qehuy pqwasan laqi cikuy 霞雲國民小學Hbun pqwasan laqi cikuy 三民國民小學Luhung pqwasan laqi cikuy 巴崚國民小學Balung pqwasan laqi cikuy 長興國民小學Kara pqwasan laqi cikuy 高義國民小學Qwilan pqwasan laqi cikuy 義盛國民小學Zihing pqwasan 'laqi cikuy pqwasan biru 'laqi' mrkyas 介壽國民中學Pyasan pqwasan laqi mrkyas pqwasan biru 'laqi' seneng 羅浮高級中學Kinyawpan pqwasan biru laqi' seneng tokusan 1.qapu' 2.qqzimux 3.qapu' 4.tqinu 5.bsyaw hmgiru lmosay kya qu 'san mhkangi' na tuqi ru hongu' hkngyan ru ulay ru qrqhuniq ka ppi'an ru tgliq sa Rahu. basu lglgan ga kya "Tayuan k_yun"ru "cwungli k_yun"ru "Taywan hawsin"

== Hosing Ku(復興區 qalang Pyasan) == Pyasan hiya' ga spyang ini khmay squliq nya maki sa Toweng. Pyasan hiya' ga qutux lahuy qalang rgyax. Hosing Ku (復興區, Pyasan) mki sku Toweng si. su'unun kwara glabang lingay 'kiyan ga 336.75 km² (rhyan rinpang glabang lingay 'kiyan ga 195.32 km², rr'an hyan glabang lingay 'kiyan ga 120.65 km²), 10,692 hi ku su'unun kwara alang hi kya, 3,655 buwan ku kwarakya, tiku sahuy na alang Gyencumin ga 6,817 hi, kyala kwara pinspung s'uli ga 64%. kwara sahuy na alang Gyencumin ga Taywang Gyencumin na Tayan ku smrrhu ku pyux s'uli taya kya. rhzyal kki'an Xusing ga cyux maki sa tong nan na Toweng sohih Sinciku, yatux ga sobih Cyama. rekisi Fuxing , lalu' nya 'Tayal sraral ga Pyasan, trang maki Gipun ga Sinciku syu Cyma gun, masup pciriq lga sllwan nha Pyasan. kawas 1954 te mpou byacing ru mtzyul ryax lga sllwan nha Fuxing syang la. skahul sinbung minrwan trang ryax nasa ga, "m_yan nyux sqqas ita' 'Tayal mha hintgan na soto ki nyux nha galun Taywan" lma', ru spwah nha syang kong so' miru biru teta smwan qu sexu'. kawas 2014 te mopu sazing byacing mpusal magal ryax, yugun na sexu Toyen keng sa Toyen si' lga, yasa gmlu m'iyuw sa Fuxing cyu'i la. Kawas 2014 spwah nha "Taywan gyencumin pulwo sintong lyenmong"kmal mha aki zyugun lalu na "Pyasan"squ "Pyaway"ini ga "Pyasan Pyaway", ana ga ini swali' 'Tayal qalang Pyasan. ays ptyaw sebu Hosing Ku ays psgayun 10 ru 58 alang. 58 alang hani ga, Pyasan , Rahaw(Takan) , Wsilung , Hbun , Hbun-sinqumi , Kinyawpan , Rangay , Kawbu' , Khpan , Raga' , Rahu' , Qapu' , Qus , Yubang , Triqan , Zihing , Kayu-baliq , Kzyay , Tuba , Luhung , Blhuy , Blhuy , Bilus , Qoyaw , Qoyaw , Silong , Qoyaw , Snazi , Kin'lwan , Sqiy , Cyasi , Yuwhbun raka , Kayway , Qus , Qmocyan ,Babau , Qnau , Ksunu' , Qehuy , Kuli , Sbunaw , Quri , Uruw , Tkasan , Raka , Piyaway , Tgleq , Saruc , Twan nokan , Zihing , Qrahu , Tqwiy , Ngurus , Qphay , Balung , 'Bu balung , Qara , Quzi . rhzyal​ tay 'zil na Hosing Ku hya' ga wsilung krahu'. tay 'zil na Hosing Ku hya' ga Nahuy go, Kansai go. tuqi qsya' ki rrhzyal maki na ryax khangan Gipun na' ga kya magal qu ulay nya, nanu sga "Syasan, Qrahu', Pyaway, Balung ki Rahu". misu qani ga nanak ulay Syasan ki Qrahu' nyux msthay la, kwara ulay sraral ga wal blun uraw kwara la. Kawas 1997 sllwan nha "ulay Gihing"qu "ulay Balung". tuqi 'san kya qu "Tay 7 Syan"ru "S_taw 118 haw" ssquliq pinlpgan misu qani maki te mtzyu' qalang gyencumin 'Tayal sa rgrgyax squ Taywan ga yasa son p'yang khmay na qalang gyencumin 'Tayal. gmlu sa nyux 'n_gyut khmay qu Toyen lga 'n_gyut khmay uzi ru magal kawas misu qani mga maki te spat lpgan qu kinhelaw nya tmuwang pzyux squliq nya squ kwara' ita Taywan. kisya' glgan Ungat kisya' glgan hiya kintzyux na Squliq kayal ppqbaqan pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy 介壽國民小學 Pyasan pqwasan laqi cikuy 三光國民小學 Gogan pqwasan laqi cikuy 光華國民小學Ngurus pqwasan laqi cikuy 羅浮國民小學Kinyawpan pqwasan laqi cikuy 奎輝國民小學Qehuy pqwasan laqi cikuy 霞雲國民小學Hbun pqwasan laqi cikuy 三民國民小學Luhung pqwasan laqi cikuy 巴崚國民小學Balung pqwasan laqi cikuy 長興國民小學Kara pqwasan laqi cikuy 高義國民小學Qwilan pqwasan laqi cikuy 義盛國民小學Zihing pqwasan 'laqi cikuy pqwasan biru 'laqi' mrkyas 介壽國民中學Pyasan pqwasan laqi mrkyas pqwasan biru 'laqi' seneng 羅浮高級中學Kinyawpan pqwasan biru laqi' seneng tokusan 1.qapu' 2.qqzimux 3.qapu' 4.tqinu 5.bsyaw hmgiru lmosay kya qu 'san mhkangi' na tuqi ru hongu' hkngyan ru ulay ru qrqhuniq ka ppi'an ru tgliq sa Rahu. basu lglgan ga kya "Tayuan k_yun"ru "cwungli k_yun"ru "Taywan hawsin"
S.PHON: == ħos~ɕiŋ ku(*** qalaŋ pjas~ɕan) == pjas~ɕan ħijaʔ ɣa s~ɕpjaŋ ini kħmaj s~ɕquliq nja maki s~ɕa toweŋ. pjas~ɕan ħijaʔ ɣa qutux laħuj qalaŋ rɣjax. ħos~ɕiŋ ku (***, pjas~ɕan) mki s~ɕku toweŋ s~ɕi. s~ɕuʔunun kwara ɣlaβaŋ liŋaj ʔkijan ɣa ***.** km* (rħjan rinpaŋ ɣlaβaŋ liŋaj ʔkijan ɣa ***.** km*, rrʔan ħjan ɣlaβaŋ liŋaj ʔkijan ɣa ***.** km*), **,*** ħi ku s~ɕuʔunun kwara alaŋ ħi kja, *,*** βuwan ku kwarakja, tiku s~ɕaħuj na alaŋ ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa *,*** ħi, kjala kwara pins~ɕpuŋ s~ɕʔuli ɣa **%. kwara s~ɕaħuj na alaŋ ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa tajwaŋ ɣjenʦ~ʨumin na tajan ku s~ɕmrrħu ku pjux s~ɕʔuli taja kja. rħzjal kkiʔan xus~ɕiŋ ɣa ʦ~ʨjux maki s~ɕa toŋ nan na toweŋ s~ɕoħiħ s~ɕinʦ~ʨiku, jatux ɣa s~ɕoβiħ ʦ~ʨjama. rekis~ɕi *uxiŋ , laluʔ nja ʔtajal s~ɕraral ɣa pjas~ɕan, traŋ maki ɣipun ɣa s~ɕinʦ~ʨiku s~ɕju ʦ~ʨjma ɣun, mas~ɕup pʦ~ʨiriq lɣa s~ɕllwan nħa pjas~ɕan. kawas~ɕ **** te mpou βjaʦ~ʨiŋ ru mtzjul rjax lɣa s~ɕllwan nħa *uxiŋ s~ɕjaŋ la. s~ɕkaħul s~ɕinβuŋ minrwan traŋ rjax nas~ɕa ɣa, "məjan njux s~ɕqqas~ɕ itaʔ ʔtajal mħa ħintɣan na s~ɕoto ki njux nħa ɣalun tajwan" lmaʔ, ru s~ɕpwaħ nħa s~ɕjaŋ koŋ s~ɕoʔ miru βiru teta s~ɕmwan qu s~ɕexuʔ. kawas~ɕ **** te mopu s~ɕaziŋ βjaʦ~ʨiŋ mpus~ɕal maɣal rjax, juɣun na s~ɕexu tojen keŋ s~ɕa tojen s~ɕiʔ lɣa, jas~ɕa ɣmlu mʔijuw s~ɕa *uxiŋ ʦ~ʨjuʔi la. kawas~ɕ **** s~ɕpwaħ nħa "tajwan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin pulwo s~ɕintoŋ ljenmoŋ"kmal mħa aki zjuɣun lalu na "pjas~ɕan"s~ɕqu "pjawaj"ini ɣa "pjas~ɕan pjawaj", ana ɣa ini s~ɕwaliʔ ʔtajal qalaŋ pjas~ɕan. ajs~ɕ ptjaw s~ɕeβu ħos~ɕiŋ ku ajs~ɕ ps~ɕɣajun ** ru ** alaŋ. ** alaŋ ħani ɣa, pjas~ɕan , raħaw(takan) , ws~ɕiluŋ , ħβun , ħβun-s~ɕinqumi , kinjawpan , raŋaj , kawβuʔ , kħpan , raɣaʔ , raħuʔ , qapuʔ , qus~ɕ , juβaŋ , triqan , ziħiŋ , kaju-βaliq , kzjaj , tuβa , luħuŋ , βlħuj , βlħuj , βilus~ɕ , qojaw , qojaw , s~ɕiloŋ , qojaw , s~ɕnazi , kinʔlwan , s~ɕqij , ʦ~ʨjas~ɕi , juwħβun raka , kajwaj , qus~ɕ , qmoʦ~ʨjan ,βaβau , qnau , ks~ɕunuʔ , qeħuj , kuli , s~ɕβunaw , quri , uruw , tkas~ɕan , raka , pijawaj , tɣleq , s~ɕaruʦ~ʨ , twan nokan , ziħiŋ , qraħu , tqwij , ŋurus~ɕ , qpħaj , βaluŋ , ʔβu βaluŋ , qara , quzi . rħzjal* taj ʔzil na ħos~ɕiŋ ku ħjaʔ ɣa ws~ɕiluŋ kraħuʔ. taj ʔzil na ħos~ɕiŋ ku ħjaʔ ɣa naħuj ɣo, kans~ɕai ɣo. tuqi qs~ɕjaʔ ki rrħzjal maki na rjax kħaŋan ɣipun naʔ ɣa kja maɣal qu ulaj nja, nanu s~ɕɣa "s~ɕjas~ɕan, qraħuʔ, pjawaj, βaluŋ ki raħu". mis~ɕu qani ɣa nanak ulaj s~ɕjas~ɕan ki qraħuʔ njux ms~ɕtħaj la, kwara ulaj s~ɕraral ɣa wal βlun uraw kwara la. kawas~ɕ **** s~ɕllwan nħa "ulaj ɣiħiŋ"qu "ulaj βaluŋ". tuqi ʔs~ɕan kja qu "taj * s~ɕjan"ru "s~ɕətaw *** ħaw" s~ɕs~ɕquliq pinlpɣan mis~ɕu qani maki te mtzjuʔ qalaŋ ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ʔtajal s~ɕa rɣrɣjax s~ɕqu tajwan ɣa jas~ɕa s~ɕon pʔjaŋ kħmaj na qalaŋ ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ʔtajal. ɣmlu s~ɕa njux ʔnɣjut kħmaj qu tojen lɣa ʔnɣjut kħmaj uzi ru maɣal kawas~ɕ mis~ɕu qani mɣa maki te s~ɕpat lpɣan qu kinħelaw nja tmuwaŋ pzjux s~ɕquliq nja s~ɕqu kwaraʔ ita tajwan. kis~ɕjaʔ ɣlɣan uŋat kis~ɕjaʔ ɣlɣan ħija kintzjux na s~ɕquliq kajal ppqβaqan pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ ʦ~ʨikuj ****** pjas~ɕan pqwas~ɕan laqi ʦ~ʨikuj ****** ɣoɣan pqwas~ɕan laqi ʦ~ʨikuj ******ŋurus~ɕ pqwas~ɕan laqi ʦ~ʨikuj ******kinjawpan pqwas~ɕan laqi ʦ~ʨikuj ******qeħuj pqwas~ɕan laqi ʦ~ʨikuj ******ħβun pqwas~ɕan laqi ʦ~ʨikuj ******luħuŋ pqwas~ɕan laqi ʦ~ʨikuj ******βaluŋ pqwas~ɕan laqi ʦ~ʨikuj ******kara pqwas~ɕan laqi ʦ~ʨikuj ******qwilan pqwas~ɕan laqi ʦ~ʨikuj ******ziħiŋ pqwas~ɕan ʔlaqi ʦ~ʨikuj pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ mrkjas~ɕ ******pjas~ɕan pqwas~ɕan laqi mrkjas~ɕ pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ s~ɕeneŋ ******kinjawpan pqwas~ɕan βiru laqiʔ s~ɕeneŋ tokus~ɕan *.qapuʔ *.qqzimux *.qapuʔ *.tqinu *.βs~ɕjaw ħmɣiru lmos~ɕaj kja qu ʔs~ɕan mħkaŋiʔ na tuqi ru ħoŋuʔ ħkŋjan ru ulaj ru qrqħuniq ka ppiʔan ru tɣliq s~ɕa raħu. βas~ɕu lɣlɣan ɣa kja "tajuan kəjun"ru "ʦ~ʨwuŋli kəjun"ru "tajwan ħaws~ɕin"
